detail.description: Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to third baseman Blaze Alexander. Spencer Steer to 2nd.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to center fielder Colton Cowser, deflected by second baseman Jackson Holliday.
Jose Trevino doubles (3) on a line drive to right fielder Leody Taveras. Spencer Steer scores.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio.
Jose Trevino singles on a line drive to left fielder Jackson Chourio.
Jose Trevino singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Juan Soto.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tommy Troy. Matt McLain to 2nd.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jacob Young, deflected by shortstop CJ Abrams. Spencer Steer scores. Blake Dunn scores. Matt McLain to 3rd.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to center fielder Brenton Doyle.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell. Matt McLain to 2nd.
Jose Trevino homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Eugenio Suárez scores. Noelvi Marte scores.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio, deflected by third baseman David Hamilton.
Jose Trevino singles on a ground ball to right fielder Troy Johnston.
Jose Trevino homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.
Jose Trevino homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.

Jose Trevino hits a ground-rule double (2) on a fly ball to left-center field.
